name: Rein Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Overview and Recent Developments We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapies for the treatment of orphan pulmonary and fibrosis indications with no approved or limited effective treatments. We currently have two product candidates in clinical development, LTI-03 and LTI-01, however, due to insufficient funding we have paused development of LTI01 for an undetermined period of time and are prioritizing LTI03. Our pipeline includes: LTI-03, a peptide, for...
